title: aster ascendens var. ciliatifolius
intro: Aster ascendens var. ciliatifolius, also known as the leafy aster or ciliate-leaved aster, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in soothing wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall health by reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Aster ascendens var. ciliatifolius is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
